response.overview: Mark Christopher made a number of alterations, from the original version that Miramax had approved, to his 1998 film 54, a fiction movie about the infamous Studio 54 in New York City; including gay-acting scenes for characters Shane (Ryan Phillippe) and Steve (Mike Myers). It had its premiere at the 65th International Berlin Festival in 2015.
response.title: 54: The Director’s Cut
